source_milestone: R17 Agentic Operating Surface, A2A Runtime, and Kanban Release Cycle

current_posture.current_achievement_scope: R17-003 adds KPI baseline and target scorecard only; current scores reflect R16 final bounded foundation posture and exclude R17 target ambition.

priority_domains.priority_reason: R17 must make the operator workflow visible and usable through the Orchestrator and board surface.
R17 must convert Markdown/stateful planning into a visible board/card lifecycle and event ledger.
R17 must show bounded invocations, logs, and RACI separation instead of role narration.
R17 must use R16 scoped memory/artifact refs in live task packets without broad scans in the happy path.
R17 must put Developer/Codex and QA/Test Agent adapters into the controlled release cycle.
R17 must implement bounded adapter architecture for Developer/Codex, QA/Test, Evidence Auditor API, and board surfaces.
R17 must add stop/retry/re-entry, secret, cost, timeout, and runaway-loop controls.

domain_scores.current_score_basis: baseline/current achieved only from R16 final posture; no live R17 product surface exists yet
domain_scores.evidence_posture: R16 report and governance evidence; no live UI or product loop yet
domain_scores.target_rationale: R17 target requires an exercised Orchestrator-to-board workflow and visible operator surface.
domain_scores.next_correction: Implement board and Orchestrator workflow before raising achieved product-experience maturity.
risks: Planning docs may be mistaken for product experience.
Visible product behavior must not be claimed until exercised.

domain_scores.current_score_basis: baseline/current achieved only; R16 has role/workflow artifacts but no live board
domain_scores.evidence_posture: Committed R16 workflow artifacts and Markdown KANBAN, without live board runtime
domain_scores.target_rationale: R17 target requires live card state, board event ledger, transition validation, and UI/control surface.
domain_scores.next_correction: Define card and board contracts before claiming live board orchestration.
risks: Markdown KANBAN is not the R17 Kanban product runtime.
Board state must remain repo-bound and auditable.

domain_scores.current_score_basis: baseline/current achieved only; R16 role envelopes and drills exist but are non-executable
domain_scores.evidence_posture: Committed role/RACI artifacts, transition gates, and blocked drill reports
domain_scores.target_rationale: R17 target requires bounded A2A invocations, logs, role-bound outputs, and four audited cycles.
domain_scores.next_correction: Implement agent registry and invocation logging before claiming agent workforce maturity movement.
risks: Role labels can be mistaken for actual agents.
Fake multi-agent narration must not be accepted as proof.

domain_scores.current_score_basis: baseline/current achieved only; R16 produced scoped memory/artifact/context artifacts but no live loader
domain_scores.evidence_posture: Committed R16 memory, artifact map, audit map, context-load, budget, and guard artifacts
domain_scores.target_rationale: R17 target requires live scoped memory loading into task packets and no broad scans in the happy path.
domain_scores.next_correction: Bind R16 refs into R17 agent packets before claiming live memory/context maturity.
risks: R16 artifacts can be mistaken for live memory runtime.
Codex compaction remains unsolved.

domain_scores.current_score_basis: baseline/current achieved only; R16 validation is strong locally but lacks Dev/QA adapter runtime
domain_scores.evidence_posture: Committed local validation and proof-review packages, no Developer/Codex or QA/Test adapter runtime
domain_scores.target_rationale: R17 target requires Developer/Codex adapter, QA/Test Agent adapter, defect/fix loop, and validation logs.
domain_scores.next_correction: Implement common adapter contract before claiming in-cycle execution/QA maturity.
risks: Executor output cannot self-certify QA.
QA must not implement fixes.

domain_scores.current_score_basis: baseline/current achieved only; R16 evidence is strong but no Evidence Auditor API runtime exists
domain_scores.evidence_posture: Committed R16 proof-review package candidate and status gates, without external audit acceptance
domain_scores.target_rationale: R17 target requires Evidence Auditor API request/response/verdict artifacts and non-claim/rejected-claim audit.
domain_scores.next_correction: Define audit adapter contract and safety metadata before claiming API audit movement.
risks: Report text can be mistaken for audit acceptance.
External audit acceptance needs concrete request/response and verdict evidence.

domain_scores.current_score_basis: baseline/current achieved only; R16 architecture is internal and adapter direction only
domain_scores.evidence_posture: Architecture direction and internal contracts only; no external adapters implemented
domain_scores.target_rationale: R17 target requires bounded adapter implementation for Developer/Codex, QA/Test, Evidence Auditor API, and board surface.
domain_scores.next_correction: Implement adapter contracts and bounded runtime surfaces before claiming integration maturity.
risks: Adapter direction is not adapter runtime.
External integrations remain non-claims until implemented.

domain_scores.current_score_basis: baseline/current achieved only; R16 has final-head support and branch discipline but no R17 release cycle runner yet
domain_scores.evidence_posture: Committed branch/final-head support and status discipline
domain_scores.target_rationale: R17 target requires exercised release-cycle runner, final package, final-head support, and validation manifest.
domain_scores.next_correction: Keep final proof packaging separate from current opening evidence.
risks: R17 opening can be mistaken for closeout readiness.
Main merge remains a non-claim.

domain_scores.current_score_basis: baseline/current achieved only; R16 guard/non-claim controls exist but no R17 runtime stop/cost controls yet
domain_scores.evidence_posture: Committed R16 context guard and non-claim controls
domain_scores.target_rationale: R17 target requires secret/cost gates plus stop/retry/re-entry controls exercised in adapter flow.
domain_scores.next_correction: Define and exercise R17 safety controls before claiming safety maturity movement.
risks: API keys must never be committed.
Runaway tool/API loops need fail-closed limits.

domain_scores.current_score_basis: baseline/current achieved only; R16 friction metrics exist but are not board-visible improvement cards yet
domain_scores.evidence_posture: Committed R16 friction metrics report and KPI/reporting standards
domain_scores.target_rationale: R17 target requires friction metrics to become board-visible cards and KPI movement evidence.
domain_scores.next_correction: Convert R16 friction lessons into board-visible R17 work items.
risks: Auto-research remains governed proposal territory only.
Continuous improvement should not bypass evidence gates.

weighted_aggregate.achieved_scope: Current achieved evidence through R17-003 only, based on R16 final bounded foundation posture and R17 opening artifacts.

target_aggregate.target_scope: Target maturity if future R17 tasks produce evidence by closeout.

previous_reference_runs.metric: bounded R16 final proof/review package candidate
previous_reference_runs.comparability: reference only; R17 scorecard records target posture for a new productization milestone

target_not_achievement_disclaimer.statement: Targets express R17 closeout ambition only and cannot be counted as achieved implementation evidence.

non_claims: no Evidence Auditor API runtime yet
no Dev/Codex executor adapter runtime yet
no QA/Test Agent adapter runtime yet
no R17-004 or later implementation yet
KPI targets are not achieved scores

invalid_state_rules.description: The scorecard must contain exactly the approved 10 KPI domains.
Domain weights must match the KPI model and sum to 100.
Maturity outside 0..5 and confidence outside A..E fail validation.
Current achieved scores cannot exceed evidence caps.
Targets cannot be counted as achieved implementation evidence.
R17-003 cannot claim R17-004 or later implementation.
Product runtime, adapter runtime, A2A runtime, autonomous-agent, and multi-agent overclaims fail validation.
R13 closure, R14 caveat removal, R15 caveat removal, R16 overclaim, main merge, or external audit acceptance fail validation.
